message:
feat(command): use server run_id as master_replid in INFO replication

Redis uses the same ID for both run_id and master_replid. Updated INFO
replication section to use store.server_run_id instead of hardcoded zeros.
Mark info_replication_section fixture as any_bulk (dynamic value).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
